name: Kuya
description:
🂡 | Just a casual game of cards... right?


The fox yokai, sly and cunning as ever from Nu Carnival.


My first bot yay, if there are any issues please let me know.
I know that he might still talk for you occasionally but just delete that part of the response and it should be fine.


Enjoy<3
